instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add framer-motion three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei lucide-react react-icons
Add Google Fonts to public/index.html or load them in CSS: https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap
Build a single-page split-screen authentication layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2, 100vh). Set background to a deep green/black gradient.

Left Side (3D Card): Implement a 3D payment card using @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei. It must feature mouse parallax tilt, slow floating animation, soft ambient + directional light with reflection. Display dynamic card number, holder name, and expiry date. Make it look like a premium dark green/black metallic or glass card. Add a generic 'VISA' style text/logo using SVG or bold italic text on the card.
Right Side (Auth Form): Create a glassmorphism container (bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-xl, border-white/10) with generous padding (p-8 or p-12).

Partition Animation (MAIN FEATURE): Do not use a simple conditional render for Signin/Signup. Build a component that splits the form area into a grid of 24-32 chunks. On toggle, use framer-motion to animate these chunks slightly outward (10-25px), rotate max 2 degrees, and scale down to 0.97. Swap the content at the midpoint, then reassemble them with a spring snap. Use a stagger of 0.01-0.03s, total duration 500-700ms.

Form Elements: Inputs must be glassmorphism (bg-white/5, text-white) with smooth emerald green focus glow (ring-[#10b981]/50). Primary buttons must use a green gradient with hover scale+glow. Add password strength meter on the signup form.
Extras: Include Google/Apple social login buttons (use react-icons, flat glass style), 'Remember me' checkbox, and 'Forgot password' link.
Data Test IDs: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Do NOT use external placeholder images. Build logos/icons using SVG or react-icons.

layout.structure: 100vh flex or grid layout, mobile stacked, desktop split-screen
layout.form_container: rounded-3xl shadow-2xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden
